settings.achievements_storage_hint: Point this at a folder your own sync tool (Dropbox, iCloud, etc.) watches to carry your stats between machines. Stored encrypted; nothing is sent anywhere unless your sync tool does it.
settings.achievements_import_hint: Replaces all local stats and rank progress with the contents of a file you pick. Cannot be undone.
settings.entity_database_hint: Your entity database folder holds entities.xml, authority packs, and raw authority downloads.
settings.entity_database_missing: No entity database folder is configured. Disambiguation is blocked until you choose one.
settings.entity_database_move_hint: Relocate the entire database to another folder (e.g. Dropbox or iCloud). All files move with it; the old folder is removed after success.
settings.entity_database_move_error: Could not move the entity database.
settings.remember_workspace_on_startup: Reopen project and tabs on startup
settings.setup_incomplete: Set your language, user name, and database folder before closing settings.

messages.some_features_are_not_fully_implemented: Some features are not fully implemented

LW.Annotations that overlap will be created: Annotations that overlap will be created in RDF only, with no equivalent XML tags
LW.Applying this schema change will cause a: Applying this schema change will cause a document loading error
LW.Quick Correction requires selected text: Select text and enter a correction for a sic/corr substitution.
Enter the text to mark as supplied.
LW.Quick Correction requires selected text: Select the text to mark as surplus.
LW.Tag Correction requires selected text an: Select text and enter a correction.
Enter the text to mark as supplied.
Select the text to mark as surplus.
LW.it_can_produce_unexpected_results_or_mak: It can produce unexpected results or make LEAF-Writer crash
LW.LEAF-Writer cannot guarantee that the do: LEAF-Writer cannot guarantee that the document will work correctly with the selected schema
LW.Only RDF will be created for entities th: Only RDF will be created for entities that overlap existing XML structures
LW.Only XML tags No RDF Semantic Web annota: Only XML tags. No RDF/Semantic Web annotations will be created.
LW.Please select a {tagName} tag to transla: Please select a {{tagName}} tag to translate
LW.Please select some text before adding an: Please select some text before adding an entity
LW.some_features_are_not_fully_implemented: Some features are not fully implemented
LW.Tagging might not work as expected: Tagging might not work as expected
LW.text_nodes_required_for_accuracy: Text Nodes must be displayed for better accuracy
LW.The current document is using this schem: The current document is using this schema
LW.The current documents root element does: The current document's root element does not match the root elements required by the selected schema
LW.The existing RDF annotations will be dis: The existing RDF annotations will be discarded and no RDF will be created when tagging entities
LW.The root element of the schema could not: The root element of the schema could not be determined and so it will not be used
LW.URL must start with HTTPS secured connec: URL must start with HTTPS (secured connection)
LW.XML tags and RDF - Semantic Web annotati: XML tags and RDF - Semantic Web annotations equivalent to the XML tags will be created consistent with the hierarchy of the XML schema so annotations will not be allowed to overlap
LW.You can change the editor mode anytime i: You can change the editor mode anytime in the status bar (bottom left)
LW.You have overlapping entities and are at: The document has overlapping entities, and you are attempting to switch to a mode that prohibits them. If you continue, the overlapping entities will be discarded.
LW.You must provide a username to make requ: You must provide a username to make requests
LW.You will be able to tag and edit the tex: You will be able to tag and edit the text in the main document

editorToolbar.Correction Display tooltip: Cycle how editorial markup (sic/corr, supplied, surplus) is displayed
editorToolbar.Lock Text tooltip: Prevent typing and deleting in the editor; tagging still works (Enter, Alt+Enter).
editorToolbar.Unlock Text tooltip: Allow typing and deleting in the editor again.
editorToolbar.Quick Correction tooltip: Mark editorial changes: substitute (sic/corr), add (<supplied>), or delete (<surplus>)
editorToolbar.Correction tooltip: Mark editorial changes: substitute (sic/corr), add (<supplied>), or delete (<surplus>)
editorToolbar.Hide Breaks tooltip: Hide line and page breaks so interrupted text reads as one continuous block
editorToolbar.Show Breaks tooltip: Show line and page breaks in the editor
editorToolbar.Hide Notes tooltip: Fold up all note, citation, and keyword commentary
editorToolbar.Show Notes tooltip: Expand all note, citation, and keyword commentary inline
